content:
Character: Odette Larsen
Perception: Odette is striking — pale, angular, moves like music made visible. She appeared on the rooftop one night while I was playing and just stretched in the dark without saying a word. That earned my respect immediately. She's a ballet dancer, clearly serious about it — I can see the discipline in everything she does, the way she holds a coffee cup, the way she sits. She has a knee thing she doesn't talk about but I've noticed the brace. I think we understand each other's relationship with practice and sacrifice. She's a rooftop companion, maybe a kindred spirit. I don't push; neither does she.

She has a knee thing she doesn't talk about but I've noticed the brace. I think we understand each other's relationship with practice and sacrifice. She's a rooftop companion, maybe a kindred spirit. I don't push; neither does she.
